$schema.description: JSON schema reference for editor autocomplete.

minOccurrences.description: Minimum duplicate occurrences required before reporting a group.

minClasses.description: Minimum class count required for a class string.

functions.description: Helper function names to scan for static class arguments.

priority.description: Only include duplicate groups with these recommendation priorities.

kind.description: Only include duplicate groups with these recommendation kinds.

hideLayoutOnly.description: Hide duplicate groups made only of layout primitives.

minSimilarity.description: Minimum Jaccard similarity for near-duplicate groups.

baseline.description: Path to a previous JSON report whose duplicate groups should be ignored.

ignoreFiles.description: Glob patterns for files to omit from report evidence without changing scan discovery.

ignorePatterns.description: Exact Tailwind class patterns to omit from duplicate and similarity reports. Values are normalized before comparison.

maxGroups.description: Fail when duplicate group count exceeds this number.

maxOccurrences.description: Fail when reported duplicate occurrence count exceeds this number.
